mapper.sql: id, article_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_comment (id, article_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_comment SET content = #{content}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_comment SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), status = 'DELETED', version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
